parameters:
{'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/batch_assign_responsible_person', 'case_id': 'OBAR_001', 'title': '订单列表分配一个负责人--正常分配', 'description': '验证批量将订单分配给指定负责人的接口功能', 'json': {'orderIdList': ['${order_id}'], 'shopId': '${shop_id}', 'responsiblePersonId': '${responsible_person_id}', 'responsiblePersonName': '${responsible_person_name}'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT order_id
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders
WHERE shop_id = '71008738021cd3393bacbac182bd6a86af0b5c87'
  AND create_time >= DATE_SUB( NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY )
  AND order_id != '${excluded_order_id}'
ORDER BY create_time DESC
LIMIT 1;
", 'column': 'order_id'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': '$.responseType', 'operator': '==', 'value': 'SUCCESS'}, {'path': '$.errorMessage', 'operator': '==', 'value': None}, {'path': '$.businessSuccess', 'operator': '==', 'value': True}, {'path': '$.finalSuccess', 'operator': '==', 'value': True}]}

children.name: OST_012 | 验证今日未还订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_012', 'title': '验证今日未还订单统计', 'description': '今日未还：租用中且应还日期小于等于今日且未实际归还（需根据业务调整条件）', 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cobs.order_id) AS total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders AS cuo
INNER JOIN llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages AS cobs ON cobs.order_id = cuo.order_id
WHERE
cobs.statement_date >= CURDATE()
AND cobs.statement_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND cobs.STATUS IN (1)
AND cuo.STATUS IN ('06', '07')
AND cuo.is_violation IN ('01', '03')
AND cobs.shop_id = '${shop_id}';
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='21')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: OST_013 | 验证今日已还订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_013', 'title': '验证今日已还订单统计', 'description': "今日已还：今日内实际归还的订单（status='22'）", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT re.order_id) AS total_count
FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT bs.order_id
FROM llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages bs
LEFT JOIN llxz_order.ct_user_orders uo ON bs.order_id = uo.order_id
WHERE bs.repayment_date >= CURDATE()
    AND bs.repayment_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    AND uo.STATUS IN ('06', '09')
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages bse
        WHERE bse.order_id = bs.order_id AND bse.STATUS = '4'
    )
    AND uo.shop_id = '${shop_id}'

UNION ALL

SELECT DISTINCT bs.order_id
FROM llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages bs
LEFT JOIN llxz_order.ct_user_orders uo ON bs.order_id = uo.order_id
LEFT JOIN llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages_part sp ON bs.id = sp.periods_id
WHERE sp.create_time >= CURDATE()
    AND sp.create_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    AND bs.STATUS IN ('1', '2')
    AND uo.STATUS IN ('06', '09')
    AND sp.STATUS = '3'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages bse
        WHERE bse.order_id = bs.order_id AND bse.STATUS = '4'
    )
    AND uo.shop_id = '${shop_id}'
    ) re;
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='22')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: OST_014 | 验证明日到期订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_014', 'title': '验证明日到期订单统计', 'description': "明日到期：租用中且应还日期为明天（status='23'）", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cobs.order_id) AS total_count
FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders AS cuo
INNER JOIN llxz_order.ct_order_by_stages AS cobs ON cobs.order_id = cuo.order_id
WHERE cobs.statement_date BETWEEN CONCAT( CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY, ' 00:00:00' )
                              AND CONCAT( CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY, ' 23:59:59' )
  AND cobs.STATUS = 1
  AND cuo.STATUS IN ( '06', '07' )
  AND cuo.is_violation IN ( '01', '03' )
  AND cobs.shop_id = '${shop_id}'
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='23')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}

children.name: CSQ_011 | 验证店铺投诉率
parameters:
{'case_id': 'CSQ_011', 'title': '验证店铺投诉率', 'description': '从数据库统计订单量、投诉量，调用接口获取complaintTotalNum、completedOrderNum，双向校验投诉率', 'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/orderComplaints/queryComplaintStatisticsPage', 'sql': [{'query': "SELECT
COALESCE(c.complaint_total_num, 0) AS complaint_total_num,
COALESCE(o.completed_order_num, 0) AS completed_order_num,
-- 计算投诉率（处理除数为0的情况）
CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(o.completed_order_num, 0) = 0 THEN 0
    ELSE concat(ROUND(COALESCE(c.complaint_total_num, 0) * 100.0 / o.completed_order_num, 2),'%%')
    END AS complaint_rate_percent
FROM
-- 子查询1：计算已完成订单数
(SELECT COUNT(*) AS completed_order_num
 FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders
 WHERE status IN ('01', '04', '05', '06', '07', '08', '09', '10', '12', '13', '14')
   AND create_time BETWEEN '${days_7_start}' AND '${common_end}'
   AND channel_id IN ('005', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '082', '085')
   AND (delete_time = '2001-01-01 00:00:00' OR delete_time IS NULL)
   AND withhold_type IS NOT NULL
   AND shop_id = '${shop_id}'
) o
    CROSS JOIN
-- 子查询2：计算投诉总数
    (SELECT COUNT(*) AS complaint_total_num
     FROM llxz_marketing.ct_order_complaints
     WHERE delete_time IS NULL
 AND create_time BETWEEN '${days_7_start}' AND '${common_end}'
 AND shop_id = '${shop_id}'
 AND channel IN ('004', '005', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '082', '085')
) c
", 'columns': ['complaint_total_num', 'completed_order_num', 'complaint_rate_percent']}], 'json': {'pageNum': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'categoryId': None, 'channelGroupCode': '001', 'shopId': '${shop_id}', 'startDate': '${days_7_start}', 'endDate': '${common_end}', 'sortField': 'completedOrderRateShow', 'formShopCompOrderMagnitude': '', 'orderEndNum': '', 'orderStartNum': '', 'rentType': ''}, 'min_count': 1, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': '$.rpcResult', 'operator': '==', 'value': 'SUCCESS'}, {'path': '$.businessSuccess', 'operator': '==', 'value': True}, {'path': '$.data.records[0].completedOrderRateShow', 'operator': '==', 'value': '${complaint_rate_percent}'}]}

children.name: CSQ_012 | 验证所有店铺7天内累计投诉率
parameters:
{'case_id': 'CSQ_012', 'title': '验证所有店铺7天内累计投诉率', 'description': '从数据库统计订单量、投诉量，调用接口获取complaintTotalNum、completedOrderNum，校验所有店铺7天内累计投诉率', 'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/orderComplaints/queryComplaintStatisticsPage', 'sql': [{'query': "WITH order_stats AS (
  -- 全平台订单总量
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS completed_order_num
  FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders
  WHERE status IN ('01', '04', '05', '06', '07', '08', '09', '10', '12', '13', '14')
    AND create_time BETWEEN '${days_7_start}' AND '${common_end}'
    AND channel_id IN ('005', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '082', '085')
    AND (delete_time = '2001-01-01 00:00:00' OR delete_time IS NULL)
    AND withhold_type IS NOT NULL
),
complaint_stats AS (
  -- 全平台投诉总量
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS complaint_total_num
  FROM llxz_marketing.ct_order_complaints
  WHERE delete_time IS NULL
    AND create_time BETWEEN '${days_7_start}' AND '${common_end}'
    AND channel IN ('004', '005', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '082', '085')
),
withdrawn_stats AS (
  -- 全平台已撤诉
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS withdrawn_num
  FROM llxz_marketing.ct_order_complaints
  WHERE status = 2
    AND business_model = 0
    AND delete_time IS NULL
    AND create_time BETWEEN '${days_7_start}' AND '${common_end}'
    AND channel IN ('004', '005', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '082', '085')
)
SELECT
  os.completed_order_num,
  cs.complaint_total_num,
  ws.withdrawn_num,
  -- 计算撤诉后投诉率：(投诉总量 - 已撤诉量) / 订单总量 * 100%%
  CONCAT(ROUND((COALESCE(cs.complaint_total_num, 0) - COALESCE(ws.withdrawn_num, 0)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(os.completed_order_num, 0),2),'%%') AS complaint_rate_after_withdrawn
FROM order_stats os
  CROSS JOIN complaint_stats cs
  CROSS JOIN withdrawn_stats ws
", 'columns': ['complaint_total_num', 'completed_order_num', 'withdrawn_num', 'complaint_rate_after_withdrawn']}], 'json': {'pageNum': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'categoryId': None, 'channelGroupCode': '001', 'startDate': '${days_7_start}', 'endDate': '${common_end}', 'sortField': 'completedOrderRateShow', 'formShopCompOrderMagnitude': '', 'orderEndNum': '', 'orderStartNum': '', 'rentType': ''}, 'min_count': 1, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': '$.rpcResult', 'operator': '==', 'value': 'SUCCESS'}, {'path': '$.businessSuccess', 'operator': '==', 'value': True}, {'path': '$.data.records[0].opeComplaintRateStr', 'operator': '==', 'value': '${complaint_rate_after_withdrawn}'}]}

children.name: CSQ_013 | 店铺详情-按7天区间第3天校验订单/投诉/撤诉及投诉率
parameters:
{'case_id': 'CSQ_013', 'title': '店铺详情-按7天区间第3天校验订单/投诉/撤诉及投诉率', 'description': '对于店铺 `${shop_id}`，在区间 `${today_start}` ~ `${today_end}` 。
使用 SQL 在 DB 层统计该天的已完成订单数、投诉总量、已撤诉数，并计算投诉率与撤诉后投诉率（均格式化为带百分号字符串，如 "1.23%"）。
', 'method': 'POST', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/orderComplaints/getOrderComplaintsShopDetial', 'sql': {'query': "SELECT
  COALESCE(o.completed_order_num, 0) AS completed_order_num,
  COALESCE(c.complaint_total_num, 0) AS complaint_total_num,
  COALESCE(w.withdrawn_num, 0) AS withdrawn_num,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(o.completed_order_num, 0) = 0
       THEN '0.00%%'
       ELSE CONCAT(ROUND(COALESCE(c.complaint_total_num,0) * 100.0 / o.completed_order_num, 2), '%%')
  END AS complaint_rate_percent,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(o.completed_order_num, 0) = 0
       THEN '0.00%%'
       ELSE CONCAT(ROUND((COALESCE(c.complaint_total_num,0) - COALESCE(w.withdrawn_num,0)) * 100.0 / o.completed_order_num, 2), '%%')
  END AS complaint_rate_after_withdrawn
FROM
  (SELECT COUNT(*) AS completed_order_num
   FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders
   WHERE status IN ('01','04','05','06','07','08','09','10','12','13','14')
     AND create_time BETWEEN '${today_start}' AND '${today_end}'
     AND channel_id IN ('005','007','008','009','011','012','082','085')
     AND (delete_time = '2001-01-01 00:00:00' OR delete_time IS NULL)
     AND withhold_type IS NOT NULL
     AND shop_id = '${shop_id}') o,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) AS complaint_total_num
   FROM llxz_marketing.ct_order_complaints
   WHERE delete_time IS NULL
     AND create_time BETWEEN '${today_start}' AND '${today_end}'
     AND shop_id = '${shop_id}'
     AND channel IN ('004','005','007','008','009','011','012','082','085')) c,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) AS withdrawn_num
   FROM llxz_marketing.ct_order_complaints
   WHERE status = 2
     AND business_model = 0
     AND delete_time IS NULL
     AND create_time BETWEEN '${today_start}' AND '${today_end}'
     AND shop_id = '${shop_id}'
     AND channel IN ('004','005','007','008','009','011','012','082','085')) w
", 'columns': ['completed_order_num', 'complaint_total_num', 'withdrawn_num', 'complaint_rate_percent', 'complaint_rate_after_withdrawn']}, 'json': {'pageNum': 1, 'pageSize': 10, 'shopId': '${shop_id}', 'startDate': '${today_start}', 'endDate': '${today_end}'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': '$.rpcResult', 'operator': '==', 'value': 'SUCCESS'}, {'path': '$.businessSuccess', 'operator': '==', 'value': True}, {'path': '$.data.records[0].completedOrderNum', 'operator': '==', 'value': '${completed_order_num}'}, {'path': '$.data.records[0].complaintTotalNum', 'operator': '==', 'value': '${complaint_total_num}'}, {'path': '$.data.records[0].withdrawnComplaintNum', 'operator': '==', 'value': '${withdrawn_num}'}, {'path': '$.data.records[0].completedOrderRateShow', 'operator': '==', 'value': '${complaint_rate_percent}'}, {'path': '$.data.records[0].onwithdrawnComplaintNumRate', 'operator': '==', 'value': '${complaint_rate_after_withdrawn}'}]}
